transcript: Speaker A: Want to improve your English and get your dream job? Try Duolingo's new advanced English lessons. Learn essential vocabulary and practice speaking to take your basic English to the next level for a better job. Speaker B: Would you mind giving me some tips on how to give presentations? I mostly just wrote reports at my last job. Speaker A: It's free, fun, and effective. Download Duolingo, the number one language learning app.
on_screen_text: Want to improve your English and get your dream job? Try Duolingo's new advanced English lessons. Fill in the blank. Learn essential vocabulary and practice speaking to take your basic English to the next level for a better job. Speak this sentence. Read and respond. It's fun, it's effective. duolingo. Download the world's #1 language learning app.
summary: The ad promotes Duolingo's advanced English lessons designed to help users improve their language skills for career growth. It showcases interactive features like speaking practice and reading comprehension. The call to action invites viewers to download the app.
